author: 2ZD1
content:
## Orchestration role: foundation crate

This is the FOUNDATION. Issues #6 (supervisor), #7 (server), #8 (client) are blocked by this and depend on the protocol crate.

**Scope for this issue:**
1. Convert the project to a Cargo workspace (root Cargo.toml with workspace section)
2. Move existing crossbridge code into crates/crossbridge/
3. Create crates/crossbridge-protocol/ with all message types and framing helpers per .design/protocol.md
4. Workspace.dependencies should include shared dep specs the consumer crates can inherit

**Definition of done:**
- cargo build passes for the workspace
- cargo test passes (with unit tests for framing roundtrip)
- All work committed and merged into main

**For future orchestrators**: Once this is merged into main, run `crosslink issue ready` — issues #6/#7/#8 will then be unblocked and can run in parallel.
